overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail at dusk, approaching a historic stone building with warm lantern lighting. The character passes a guard holding a torch before entering through an arched stone doorway.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the forested area with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: winding dirt path through the forest
dense deciduous trees lining both sides of the path
orange and pink sunset sky visible through the tree canopy
rocky terrain visible on the left hillside
shrubbery and undergrowth along the trail edges

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a forest at dusk. The path winds between dense trees with an orange sunset sky visible ahead. The environment is quiet and empty, with rocky terrain on the left and bushes lining the right side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic stone building entrance with lantern lighting

events.description: stone building with arched entrance comes into view on the left, replacing the forested terrain
warm yellow lantern light from the building illuminates the scene as character approaches
passes close by an NPC guard holding a torch near the entrance

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches the stone building entrance and walks through the arched doorway, passing a guard with a torch

notable_agents.action: standing guard holding a lit torch near the building entrance

entered.detail: historic stone structure with textured walls and wooden door
large stone archway entrance with columns
warm yellow lanterns mounted on the building walls
stacked wooden barrels and crates near the entrance
low stone wall running along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from forest to a historic stone building entrance. Geralt approaches the arched doorway illuminated by warm wall lanterns. Wooden barrels sit to the right of the path. A guard holding a torch stands near the entrance as Geralt walks past and enters through the archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded forest trail at dusk toward the warm, illuminated entrance of a historic stone building. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path that winds between dense trees and rocky terrain under an orange sunset sky. As the forest thins, the natural surroundings shift into a man-made environment where the path leads directly toward a large arched doorway. The scene then opens up to reveal wooden barrels and wall lanterns casting a warm glow, before the camera follows Geralt as he passes a torch-bearing guard and enters the stone archway.
